title: centranthera cochinchinensis
intro: Centranthera cochinchinensis, also known as the Vietnamese centaury or Vietnam centaury, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving digestion, due to its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Centranthera cochinchinensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine practices in various parts of Asia.
